Class HydrateRiskMapper.RiskProfile

java.lang.Object
neqsim.pvtsimulation.flowassurance.HydrateRiskMapper.RiskProfile
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
HydrateRiskMapper
public static class HydrateRiskMapper.RiskProfile extends Object implements Serializable
Complete hydrate risk profile along the pipeline.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

  • Constructor Details

    • RiskProfile

      RiskProfile(List<HydrateRiskMapper.RiskPoint> points, HydrateRiskMapper.RiskLevel overallRisk, double minimumSubcoolingC, int criticalPointCount)
      Creates a risk profile.
      Parameters:
      points - list of risk points along the pipeline
      overallRisk - worst risk level across all points
      minimumSubcoolingC - minimum subcooling margin
      criticalPointCount - number of points in CRITICAL region

  • Method Details

    • getPoints

      public List<HydrateRiskMapper.RiskPoint> getPoints()
      Gets all risk assessment points.
      Returns:
      list of risk points

    • getOverallRisk

      public HydrateRiskMapper.RiskLevel getOverallRisk()
      Gets the overall (worst) risk level.
      Returns:
      overall risk level

    • getMinimumSubcoolingC

      public double getMinimumSubcoolingC()
      Gets the minimum subcooling margin across all points.
      Returns:
      minimum subcooling in degrees C

    • getCriticalPointCount

      public int getCriticalPointCount()
      Gets the number of points in the CRITICAL (hydrate) region.
      Returns:
      count of critical points

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Converts the risk profile to a JSON string.
      Returns:
      JSON representation

    • toCSV

      public String toCSV()
      Converts the risk profile to CSV format.
      Returns:
      CSV string with header
